fast.label: Fast
fast.intent: Quick answers, short edits, lower latency cloud profile.
notes: Good default for lightweight coding tasks and iteration.
Prefer this when you want speed over maximum reasoning depth.

cheap.label: Cheap
cheap.intent: Lowest-cost cloud profile for lightweight tasks and triage.
notes: Best for rough drafts, summarization, and quick checks.
Tradeoff: weaker coding performance than the other cloud profiles.

local-only.label: Local Only
local-only.intent: Offline/private local fallback profile using Ollama.
notes: No cloud dependency once Ollama is running and the model is pulled.
Best fallback when rate limits or network issues get in the way.

max-quality.label: Max Quality
max-quality.intent: Highest-quality default profile in this stack for serious work.
notes: Use for deeper reasoning, harder coding tasks, and higher-value runs.
Expect more latency and potentially higher cost than fast/cheap.
